creator: lev@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello, Bug-followup.

When I turn on association debugging (wlandebug -i wlan0 +assoc), my log is spammed with messages:

Jul 29 15:26:44 gateway kernel: wlan0: [00:0c:42:64:69:92] HT bss occupancy change: 1 sta, 1 ht, 0 ht40, non-HT sta present, HT protmode now 0x13
Jul 29 15:26:45 gateway kernel: wlan0: [00:0c:42:64:69:92] HT bss occupancy change: 1 sta, 1 ht, 0 ht40, non-HT sta present, HT protmode now 0x11
Jul 29 15:26:45 gateway kernel: wlan0: [00:0c:42:64:69:92] HT bss occupancy change: 1 sta, 1 ht, 0 ht40, non-HT sta present, HT protmode now 0x13
Jul 29 15:26:45 gateway kernel: wlan0: [00:0c:42:64:69:92] HT bss occupancy change: 1 sta, 1 ht, 0 ht40, non-HT sta present, HT protmode now 0x11
Jul 29 15:26:45 gateway kernel: wlan0: [00:0c:42:64:69:92] HT bss occupancy change: 1 sta, 1 ht, 0 ht40, non-HT sta present, HT protmode now 0x13
Jul 29 15:26:45 gateway kernel: wlan0: [00:0c:42:64:69:92] HT bss occupancy change: 1 sta, 1 ht, 0 ht40, non-HT sta present, HT protmode now 0x11
Jul 29 15:26:45 gateway kernel: wlan0: [00:0c:42:64:69:92] HT bss occupancy change: 1 sta, 1 ht, 0 ht40, non-HT sta present, HT protmode now 0x13
Jul 29 15:26:45 gateway kernel: wlan0: [00:0c:42:64:69:92] HT bss occupancy change: 1 sta, 1 ht, 0 ht40, non-HT sta present, HT protmode now 0x11
Jul 29 15:26:45 gateway kernel: wlan0: [00:0c:42:64:69:92] HT bss occupancy change: 1 sta, 1 ht, 0 ht40, non-HT sta present, HT protmode now 0x13

 Client is turned off (Sleeping0, but still associated:

root@gateway:/usr/home/lev # ifconfig wlan0 list sta
ADDR               AID CHAN RATE RSSI IDLE  TXSEQ  RXSEQ CAPS FLAG
70:d4:f2:ad:6a:26    1    1  14M 19.0   15   1550  48784 EPS  AQEPHTR RSN HTCAP WME


-- 
// Black Lion AKA Lev Serebryakov <lev@FreeBSD.org>
